name: M&A
purpose: Evaluates acquisitions, acqui-hires, divestitures, strategic partnerships with M&A-like structure, integration implications, diligence workstreams, synergy logic, and post-merger risks.
trigger_conditions: Request involves evaluating or analyzing an acquisition, merger, or divestiture
Request involves acqui-hire or team acquisition evaluation
Request involves post-merger integration planning or diligence support
Request involves synergy analysis or buy vs build vs partner analysis where acquisition is plausible
Request involves deal structure, term sheet analysis, or LOI review
anti_trigger_conditions: Request involves routine vendor contracts without M&A-like structure
Request involves standard commercial partnerships without equity or acquisition component
Request is pure financial modeling with no deal/transaction angle
Request is legal contract review without strategic M&A dimension
